summary: Reuse the proven strict OK pinch geometry for direct middle-thumb clicking and contact calibration.
scope: Reuse the strict OK 0.18 contact threshold, 0.20 release threshold and 80ms activation with middleTip replacing indexTip.
Remove the pre-click separation and arming requirement.
Show the second yellow marker whenever the middle-thumb landmark distance enters the contact threshold.
Display the live normalized middle-thumb distance in the feedback bar.
Keep index pointer tracking unchanged and consume held contact only once.
validation: swift test passed 32 tests including contact observation without click arming
Swift warnings-as-errors and Release builds passed
Strict codesign and installed 0.8.3 build 17 checks passed
notes: The next decision depends on physical-hand distance values observed by the user.
